description: Upload files to S3/fd/gs from a browser picker or param content.

label.description: Label text displayed above the file upload widget

destinationPath.description: Destination storage path (s3://, fd://, or gs://). Supports $param substitution.

sourceMode.description: Source for files: picker (browser file picker) or content (param with base64 JSON).

contentParam.description: Canvas parameter containing file content as JSON: [{ name, content (base64), contentType? }] or a single object.

param.description: Optional output parameter. On success, broadcasts a JSON array of { path, fileName } objects.

autoUpload.description: When true, uploads automatically once the source is ready. Defaults to false for picker and true for content mode.

accept.description: Optional accept attribute for the browser file picker.

multiple.description: Allow selecting multiple files in picker mode.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "color: red; font-size: 16px")

propsSchema.description: Uploads files to a configured storage destination after validating write access for the current user token.
